productDisplayName: UCB Women's Sleeveless Off White Dress
description: CompositionOff white sleeveless dress with floral prints, made of 100% cotton, with a round neck, short buttoned placket, piping along the neckline and arm hole, and a double paneled ruffled skirt from below the bust lineFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water at 30 C Use mild detergent Do not scrub Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not dry in direct sunlight Professional wash with water (delicate) Hang for drying in shade Warm iron Wash, dry and iron inside out Do not dry clean Wear this off-white floral day dress from the united colors of benetton to feel like a little butterfly in the garden of life all day long.
